feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: WHY is Odyssey being shilled SO HARD?
entry.content: BECAUSE next week Spiderman opens. The Odyssey has pretty much One Week to earn as much as it can. The studio is in Full Panic Mode. There is no licensing for The Odyssey. No toys or action figures. No cereal or Kraft Macaroni & Cheese tie ins. This week is it's primary revenue stream. Blu Ray sales a few months from now are not going to save them. The studio is desperate.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why cast an ugly woman
entry.content: Okay I get that they forced Nolan to cast a black woman as Helen. My question is why would he choose an ugly one? Nolan at least could have went for a good looking black lady. Was Nolan forced to pick Ugly too? A nice caramel cream black lady would have been fine.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /aaa/ anti-ai alliance
entry.content: It has begun edition Resources >we don't use AI in our design or production https://mass-driver.com/article/fro m-human-hands >Speculative Growth and the AI "Bubble" [pdf] https://economics.mit.edu/sites/def ault/files/2026-07/speculative_grow th_AI_public.pdf >Generative AI Is an Engineering Disaster https://www.theatlantic.com/technol ogy/2026/07/generative-ai-engineeri ng-disaster/687901/ >WSJ: The AI Backlash Has Tech Executives Fearing for Their Lives https://www.wsj.com/us-news/the-ai- bac
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why is there so much FUD against EVs?
entry.content: I don't think EVs are perfect but in every thread, there's so much FUD against EVs, I feel like I want to adress all in one go. >EVs are a car as service This isn't inherent to EVs. An EV can be just as simple as a normal ICE car, if not even more. Besides, modern ICE cars are also loaded with electronics and optional subscriptions. This is clearly an industry-wide trend and not inherent to a particular driveline. >EVs cause pollution through electricity Even in countries with dirty electricity
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Fame is unhealthy
entry.content: Asking people to do "content" i.e. their own public relations is a bad idea. Having a face to attack is what Saul Salinsky advises his radicals to do. People are walking into a trap by showing their face for the public to see. Fame can be easily be subverted into infamy Fame in general is unhealthy. Humans aren't meant to be famous. At best/worst, the neighboring village would know your name. But making everyone have an opinion about you is a path to the dark side This is political because being
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: Dead internet theory
entry.content: It makes sense when you realize that most people already died from covid vaccine. No way there's enough people in the world to cause that much internet traffic. There is 80% chance that the person you're interacting with online is a bot.
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: As a puppygirl, you are often stereotyped as a bottom from your history of domes…
entry.content: As a puppygirl, you are often stereotyped as a bottom from your history of domestication and trainability. This notion is in fact completely false and is oftentimes a danger to your owner. When pushed too far into doing something she is uncomfortable with, puppygirls will not think twice about flipping the tables. And let's just say, their superior strength and feral nature will leave you guessing who was really in charge!
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Wayback Machine
entry.content: I was using the Wayback Machine to look for a 4chan post from 2018 about the Monon Tunnels. I hadn't even finished typing the site's URL before that popped up. I didn't click on it or look into it any further, so maybe someone else can. I really hope it's not actually that, but knowing the kinds of people out there, I honestly wouldn't be surprised if it was. This is the first time in a while I've been caught off guard while using the internet.
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Microcars
entry.content: After looking at the more recent commercials on the latest range of micro cars, I'm beginning to love them. I find appealing how compact they seem to be, and seemingly ideal for travelling in urban areas; plus them being electric.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: i2p
entry.content: >set up i2p >join the irc server >browse recent site listings >check out the official forum >it's dead >half the suggested links on the control panel don't work >all the sites with a high uptime are just test webpages and pages saying "coming soon" >no one active in any of the irc channels >most active forum appears to be a development forum with 1 i2p maintainer blogging to himself How do you actually use i2p?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Car Making Sound On Way Home After Purchasing
entry.content: Hey everyone. Just bought my wife a 2019 Porsche Cayenne Turbo with 34k miles. Engine is 4.0L TT V8. Test drove it for 20 minutes and had no problems. After purchasing, 15 min into driving home this sound starts happening and got Engine Control Unit pop up on the dash. Anyone know what this sound could be coming from? We didn’t even push the car hard on the drive home, my wife kind drove it home scared haha. https://files.catbox.moe/xr281q.mp4
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Does anyone remember the name of that porn webcomic where it was cat eared peopl…

entry.title: /int/ International: >butter fry some meat with an abundance of aromatic herbs and spices >then fry f…
entry.content: >butter fry some meat with an abundance of aromatic herbs and spices >then fry fries in that same butter >than the next day fry some mushrooms in that butter with herbs spices and meat particles >it's all delicious and smells really good I call this the dirty pan method. Do you do this iyc? I do similar stuff with stocks and soup, like poaching fish in a stock from boiling an octopus and than making a fish soup from that stock.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: Story Fan-Made(2)
entry.content: You’re a third-year high school student. It’s exactly 4:45 PM, and you’re just about to leave since the building is empty, when you suddenly decide to visit the principal to discuss a school matter. As you open the door, you find the teacher—the one you’ve always looked at with lustful eyes—standing naked before you, filming herself. How would you react? What would you do? How would you handle the situation?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I'm tired of Firefox & Brave
entry.content: Firefox and Brave are basically the only usable web browsers when it comes to Gecko & Chromium, and it's fucking tiring, when are we getting a new good browser that isn't made by absolute permarandoms and that will actually be "finished"?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: >go to buy something to drink at the supermarket >only one cashier present >huge…
entry.content: >go to buy something to drink at the supermarket >only one cashier present >huge row of people in line >ask cashier to request a second cashier to come >wait for them >cashier comes >walk at normal pace to new cashier >boomer white woman with short hair is sprinting from way behind me in line >comes up to me on my side and pushes her entire weight to my side to get me to stop and let her pass me >can't push me because not strong enough >looks at me angry and tells me to not push and take it easy

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8372 "Does this to you" Edition Previous Thread: >>84102105 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

Why don't you join us in developing, among other things, photonic quantum computing that works at room temperature. I attached the raw logs of what we did with artificial intelligence, even though I don't understand

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Sonic Youth [Neutral EP, 1982] You may not think Glenn Branca's proteges are a r…
entry.content: Sonic Youth [Neutral EP, 1982] You may not think Glenn Branca's proteges are a rock and roll band, but after all, why else would they essay a lyric like "Fucking youth/Working youth"? At their worst they sound like Polyrock mainlining metronome, at their best like one of Branca's early drafts. The best never last long enough. Not for nothing is the sonic grown-up so attached to phony grandeur. C
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >While living in Baltimore, Shakur attended eighth grade at Roland Park Middle S…
entry.content: >While living in Baltimore, Shakur attended eighth grade at Roland Park Middle School, then ninth grade at Paul Laurence Dunbar High School. He transferred to the Baltimore School for the Arts in the tenth grade, where he studied acting, poetry, jazz, and ballet. He performed in Shakespeare plays—the themes of which he identified in patterns of gang warfare and as the Mouse King in The Nutcracker ballet. At the Baltimore School for the Arts, Shakur befriended actress Jada Pinkett, who became the
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music
